title: Crispy Teff Ethiopian Stir-fry
description: A tangy, crisp, kid-friendly ethiopian dish featuring teff pasta, parmesan cheese, and other delicious ingredients for a crispy texture suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: 1 cup teff pasta
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup grated parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be omitted for a dairy-free version

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil.
Add teff pasta, onions, garlic, and cherry tomatoes. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are slightly softened.
If using parmesan cheese, crumble it into the stir-fry. The cheese will melt during the last few minutes of cooking.
Pour in the lime juice (if used) to add tanginess. Cook for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot as an appetizer or snack.
